module.name: Immunization Module
module.author: Bahmni
module.description: FHIR R4 Immunization resource for Bahmni

privilege.name: Get Immunizations
privilege.description: Allows user to view and search immunization resources

privilege.name: Add Immunizations
privilege.description: Allows user to create new immunization resources

privilege.name: Edit Immunizations
privilege.description: Allows user to edit existing immunization resources

privilege.name: Delete Immunizations
privilege.description: Allows user to delete existing immunization resources
